import pytest
from myapp.validation import validate_order, process_payment
from myapp.auth import authenticate
from myapp.exceptions import ValidationError, PaymentError, AuthError

def test_validate_order_rejects_negative_qty():
    with pytest.raises(ValidationError, match="quantity must be positive"):
        validate_order({"item": "widget", "qty": -1})

def test_payment_fraud_detection():
    with pytest.raises(PaymentError, match="fraud detected"):
        process_payment(amount=99999, card="stolen_card")

def test_auth_rejects_expired_token():
    with pytest.raises(AuthError, match="token expired"):
        authenticate(token="expired.jwt.token")

def test_validate_order_missing_fields():
    with pytest.raises(ValidationError) as exc_info:
        validate_order({})
    assert "item" in str(exc_info.value)
    assert "qty" in str(exc_info.value)
